IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: DALY 180 HOUSING DEVELOPMENT FUND CORPORATION WAS FORMED TO OWN AND OPERATE AN 84-UNIT RESIDENTIAL BUILDING LOCATED IN BRONX, NY, FOR PERSONS OF LOW-INCOME.
IRS990.MissionDesc: DALY 180 HOUSING DEVELOPMENT FUND CORPORATION WAS FORMED TO OWN AND OPERATE AN 84-UNIT RESIDENTIAL BUILDING LOCATED IN BRONX, NY, FOR PERSONS OF LOW-INCOME.
IRS990.Desc: TO PROVIDE LOW INCOME HOUSING TO 84 FAMILIES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CORPORATION HAS NOT TAKEN AN UNSUBSTANTIATED TAX POSITION THAT WOULD REQUIRE PROVISION OF A LIABILITY UNDER ASC NO. 740, INCOME TAXES, AND ACCOUNTING STANDARDS UPDATE NO. 2009-06, IMPLEMENTATION GUIDANCE ON ACCOUNTING FOR UNCERTAINTY IN INCOME TAXES AND DISCLOSURE AMENDMENTS FOR NONPUBLIC ENTITIES. AS OF JUNE 30, 2022, THE YEARS STILL SUBJECT TO AUDIT ARE FISCAL YEARS 2019 THROUGH 2022.

PHIPPS HOUSES, AN AFFILIATE OF THE REPORTING ORGANIZATION PAID COMPENSATION TO THE REPORTING ORGANIZATION'S TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL. PHIPPS HOUSES HAS ESTABLISHED THE COMPENSATION OF THE TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL USING COMPENSATION COMMITTEE, INDEPENDENT COMPENSATION CONSULTANT, FORM 990 OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS, COMPENSATION SURVEY OR STUDY, AND APPROVAL BY THE BOARD OR COMPENSATION COMMITTEE.

ADAM WEINSTEIN, PRESIDENT, IS A PARTICIPANT IN A PHIPPS HOUSES, A RELATED 501(C)(4) ORGANIZATION, SECTION 457(F) PLAN THAT REQUIRES HIM TO PERFORM SERVICES FOR A PERIOD OF TIME. HE HAS RECEIVED ANNUAL AWARDS BEGINNING IN 2017 AND (CONSISTENT WITH IRS FORM 990, SCHEDULE J INSTRUCTIONS) THESE AMOUNTS ARE TREATED AS ACCRUED OR EARNED RATABLY OVER THE COURSE OF THE SERVICE PERIOD. $87,050 IS REPORTED AS EARNED DURING THE REPORTING PERIOD WHICH IS INCLUDED IN SCHEDULE J, PART II, COLUMN (C).

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE ORGANIZATION IS PHIPPS HOUSES, A RELATED 501(C)(4) ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AS THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE ORGANIZATION, PHIPPS HOUSES HAS THE RIGHT TO ELECT THE MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION'S BOARD OF DIRECTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: UNDER NEW YORK STATE LAW, CERTAIN GOVERNANCE DECISIONS REQUIRE MEMBERSHIP APPROVAL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CERTAIN MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING BODY REVIEW THE FORM 990 FOR ACCURACY OF CONTENT AND DISCUSS AS NECESSARY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OFFICERS AND DIRECTORS MUST COMPLETE AND CERTIFY ANNUALLY A LIST OF CONFLICTS OF INTEREST.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT COMPENSATE ANY OFFICERS OR KEY EMPLOYEES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

THE COMPENSATION OF THE PRESIDENT, VICE PRESIDENTS, SECRETARY AND TREASURER REFLECTS THEIR CONTRIBUTIONS TO NOT ONLY DALY 180 HOUSING DEVELOPMENT FUND CORPORATION BUT TO ALL OF ITS AFFILIATED ENTITIES. ON A CONSOLIDATED BASIS, THE PHIPPS HOUSES GROUP HAS ANNUAL REVENUE IN EXCESS OF OVER $100 MILLION AND ASSETS CURRENTLY IN EXCESS OF $2 BILLION.

DisregardedEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: PHIPPS AFFORDABLE HOUSING ADMIN AGENT CO
PHIPPS CDC EARLY CHILDHOOD SERVICES CORP
